themes.advent1: The Lord's coming to the temple
themes.advent2: The coming of the Lord into his kingdom
themes.advent4: The coming of the Lord is near
themes.christmas+1: Living in peace as children of God
themes.epiphany+1: Preaching the Good News to the whole world
themes.epiphany+4: Jesus helps in times of need
themes.epiphany+5: Revealing the hidden glory of the kingdom of heaven
themes.ascension+1: The promised coming of the Holy Spirit
themes.pentecost: The outpouring of the Holy Spirit
themes.pentecost+1: The gifts of the Holy Spirit
themes.pentecost+2: The fruit of the Spirit and the works of the flesh
themes.trinity+2: Called to the Kingdom of God
themes.trinity+5: Living as a disciple to the end
themes.trinity+9: Make the most of every opportunity
themes.trinity+19: Working hard and providing for the church and others
themes.reformation: Salvation through Christ and grace alone / Righteousness through faith alone / The Bible as the basis of faith alone

prayers.advent1: Lord Jesus Christ! Come into the midst of your church and cleanse our hearts with your power. By your mercy free us from all the corruption of sin, so that we may receive you, our true King, with joy. Father, Son, Holy Spirit, one God who lives forever, hear our prayers. Amen.
prayers.advent2: Lord God, let us wait with thanksgiving for the coming of your Son, the Lord Jesus Christ. Awaken our hearts to prepare the way for him, and serve him with free will and a clear conscience. We ask you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit, one God now and forever. Amen.
prayers.advent3: O Lord our God, help us as we wait in faith for the coming of your Son Jesus Christ to this earth. Visit us your children and help us prepare our hearts for him. Strengthen us in grace by your Holy Spirit so that we will be truly ready for the coming of Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
prayers.advent4: Holy God our Father, we thank you for the joy you give us by the coming of your Son into this world. Help us by your Holy Spirit, for the sake of your holy name and your glory, to receive him with joy as our only Savior. Amen.
prayers.christmas: Almighty God, we thank you for sending your only Son Jesus Christ for our salvation and blessing. He is the light of your glory, the visible image of the invisible God. Help us by the power of the Holy Spirit to open our hearts to Him so that we may be cleansed of all sin and live with Him in heaven. Hear us in the name of your Son, Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.christmas+1: Holy God our Father, our Lord Jesus Christ humbled himself, taking on our human nature, and also showed us your power. Grant to us your children that we may live in peace without fear. Hear us in the name of your beloved Son, Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
prayers.christmas+2: Almighty and eternal God, as you led the wise men by the star of your Son Jesus Christ, we ask you in his name to guide us, who believe and trust in you by the power of the Holy Spirit, to behold his glory forever in heaven. Amen.
prayers.epiphany: Almighty God, you are the one who gives strength to those who ask. Because our human efforts are powerless without you, help us by the power of your Holy Spirit, given through baptism, to walk as your children in this life now, and to inherit eternal life in the world to come. Hear the prayers of your children who pray in Jesus' name. Amen.
prayers.epiphany+1: O Lord our God, who created and sustains the world with your great power, you love your whole creation and desire that all people be saved and come to know the truth. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who is the Savior of the world, we ask you to raise up servants of your kingdom to preach the gospel, both inside and outside our country, and to give listening ears and hearts of repentance to those who hear their message. Amen.
prayers.epiphany+2: Almighty God, because you are the ruler of heaven and earth, help us by the power of the Holy Spirit to live in praise of your name all our days, in the name of Jesus Christ your Son our Lord. Amen.
prayers.epiphany+3: Almighty and eternal God, daily increase your Holy Spirit and your grace so that we may trust more and more in the hope that you have given us. Awaken us and help us with your power so that we may live safely under your guiding hand. Hear us in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.epiphany+4: Almighty Heavenly Father, you know that, because of the weakness of our flesh, we cannot overcome all trials and tribulations. Therefore we ask you to strengthen our bodies and souls in times of trouble and hardship, so that we may triumph in the power of your Holy Spirit. Hear us in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.epiphany+5: God, heavenly father, be a refuge for those who believe in you and hope only in your grace. Protect your people with the power of your Holy Spirit so that they may live in your love; in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.epiphany+6: God, Heavenly Father, you are the Author and Finisher of all the good in our hearts. Help us by your Holy Spirit, in the name of your only Son, Jesus Christ, to grow in the love of Christ and in good deeds, knowing that we receive everything good from your grace alone. Amen.
prayers.lent-3: Dear God, when we were worthy of death for our sins, you redeemed us through your only Son Jesus Christ. Comfort us now with your Holy Spirit, and in your mercy save us. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.lent-2: Lord, you know that we cannot understand your Word by our own strength or wisdom. We ask you in the name of Jesus Christ that your Holy Spirit, who is our teacher, will guide us in all truth and protect us from everything that prevents us from understanding your Word. Amen.
prayers.lent-1: Lord our God, you tell us that everything done without love is worthless. Pour out your love in our hearts by the power of the Holy Spirit, so that we may be cleansed from sin and live with you forever. In the name of Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
prayers.lent1: God, our Heavenly Father, you sent your only Son to be tried and tested in our trials and tribulations. Help us by your Holy Spirit to be his followers, and overcome our enemy with his power. In the name of Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
prayers.lent2: Most High God, Heavenly Father, you know that by ourselves we can do nothing good. Protect our bodies from all evil, and cleanse our souls from all wicked thoughts, and protect us throughout our earthly and spiritual lives, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.lent3: Almighty God, we thank you for drawing us to yourself so that we can escape from the powers of darkness and always walk as children of light. In the name of your only Son Jesus Christ, we now ask you to keep us in your mighty power all the days of our lives. Amen.
prayers.lent4: Almighty God, it is your will to save us, who are sorely afflicted by sin. Make us hunger and thirst for your righteousness. Strengthen our hearts with the power of your Holy Spirit. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.lent5: Almighty God, look upon your people, the church, for whom our Lord Jesus Christ suffered the pain of death on the cross. Give us your power to be faithful followers, and make us partakers of the salvation which he has prepared for us. In the name of your beloved Son, Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
prayers.lent6: Almighty and eternal God, our Savior Jesus Christ was humbled to become man and die on the cross for us. In his mightly and exulted name, help us by your grace to be partakers of the joy of the resurrection with him. Amen.
prayers.lent7: Eternal God, when we remember the severity of our sins for which your Son, our Lord Jesus Christ suffered, we are brought again to repentance and faith. Thank you for blotting out our sins by his death and resurrection. In Jesus' name. Amen.
prayers.holy_fr: Our Holy Heavenly Father, you did not spare your only Son, but gave him up to die for us on the cross. In his name, we now ask you to send your Holy Spirit to dwell in our hearts. Lead us to trust only in your grace, and so obtain eternal life through the blood of your Son Jesus. Amen.
prayers.easter: Almighty and eternal God, you led your people out of the land of Egypt under the leadership of Moses and commanded them to eat the Passover every year. We ask now you to lead us out of our spiritual slavery to sin and make us partakers of the true Passover Lamb. On this day, our Lord Jesus Christ defeated death by His resurrection from the dead and opened the way for us to eternal life. Because he now lives, he will reign with you and the Holy Spirit forever. Glory and praise be to him. Amen.
prayers.easter_mo: God, our heavenly Father, we thank you that your Son Jesus Christ rose from the dead and appeared to his disciples. Reveal him to us in your living Word. Help us by the power of your Holy Spirit to be witnesses of his resurrection until the end. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.easter+1: Almighty and eternal God, we thank you with all our heart for bringing us to the celebration of the feast of the Resurrection. Give us faith in the forgiving word of the cross. Cleanse us from sin and give us power to walk in newness of life. In the name of your only Son, Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
prayers.easter+2: Almighty God, we thank you for saving our sinful world through the resurrection of your Son Jesus Christ from the dead. In his name, help us by the power of your Holy Spirit so that we may always hold fast to you in faith and be saved from eternal death, to become partakers of eternal joy with all believers. Amen.
prayers.easter+3: God our Heavenly Father, you are the one who rules the hearts of all believers and gives them unity with your Holy Spirit. Help all of us who are walking in this world, which is passing away, to rest our hearts in Jesus and so set our minds on the world that will not pass away. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.easter+4: O merciful and gracious God, you are the one who guides all on the path of truth by the light of your Word. Bring back those who have strayed from your truth. Give your grace to all who call on the name of Christ, to leave the evil and follow the good. Protect your children from this evil world by your Word and your Holy Spirit, and grant them eternal life in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.easter+5: Our kind and loving God, we thank you for hearing and answering our prayers. We pray to you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, trusting that you will grant us our requests as we ask in faith according to your will. Amen.
prayers.ascension: Almighty God, grant to all of us who believe in our ascended Savior Jesus Christ that we will live with him in heaven. Lord Jesus Christ, you who live and reign with the Father and the Holy Spirit, you defeated the power of death and sin and redeemed us, opening for us the door of heaven. Free us from sin and make us heirs of eternal life. Amen.
prayers.ascension+1: O Lord our God, we thank you for enlightening and comforting the hearts of believers with your Holy Spirit. Help us by your Spirit to think only of what is right and true. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit, one God forever and ever. Amen.
prayers.pentecost: Lord, our God, King of heaven and earth, we thank you for giving your only Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, to be our Savior. Holy Spirit, our God, we thank you for keeping us safe from the evil of this world and guiding us to walk in the path of holiness. Hear our prayers and accept our praise in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.pentecost+1: Our living and eternal God, we thank you for giving us your Holy Spirit to help and guide us in our life and ministry. We pray that in your holy church, built on the foundation of apostles and prophets, the gifts of the Holy Spirit may work according to your will, for your honor and for the edification of all believers. Inspire us to humble service, so that these gifts will not be a reason for us to boast, but a reason for all people to glory in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.pentecost+2: O Lord our God, Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, glory be to you! It is your will that all who believe in your Son, and are your children through holy baptism, be filled with the Holy Spirit. Lord, make us strong Christians, your sons and daughters, visible witnesses of the fruit of the Spirit in our lives. We pray in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who died and redeemed us with his blood, that you will always help us by the power of the Holy Spirit to grow towards your holiness and to put away the works of the flesh. Amen.
prayers.trinity: Almighty and eternal God, we, who are the work of your hands, thank you for giving us true faith so that we know you, our heavenly Father, your Son Jesus Christ, and the Holy Spirit. God, we pray that you comfort your church with this true faith and protect it from all harm and evil in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+1: O Lord our God, the protector of all who hope in you: in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, in your great mercy protect us with your Holy Spirit so that we do not lose the gift of eternal life but remain faithful to your forever. Amen.
prayers.trinity+2: O Lord our God, without your help, we your children can do nothing good. Empower us by the hope we have in Christ Jesus your Son. We love you, because you are the one who called us and with your saving gospel. Help us by the power of your Holy Spirit to follow your will in our thoughts and actions. In the name of our Savior Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+3: Our God, who has called us to the fellowship of your Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, you are the one we trust. We thank you for sanctifying us with your Holy Spirit, and for making us your children through your holy sacraments. Lord, we pray in the name of Jesus Christ, the head of the church, to protect us and grant us unity in the one true faith. Amen.
prayers.trinity+4: Praise be to you, O Lord our God, for you alone are the creator of righteousness and the source of peace. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask you to strengthen us with the power of your Holy Spirit so that we may live peaceful lives in this world, and that your church may resist the traps of the Devil and serve you truly. Amen.
prayers.trinity+5: Dear Lord our God, we thank you for the all the gifts you have prepared for those who love you. Pour the power of your love into our hearts so that we can love you more than anything else. Help us with your Holy Spirit so that we always treasure the hope that we have in your grace. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+6: Almighty God, everything that is good comes from you. Strengthen our faith so that we do not waste the gift that you have given us. May your Holy Spirit always be with us. Help us to love your holy name with true love, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+7: Almighty God we praise you for bringing us out of the power of darkness into the light of your only Son Jesus Christ. As we travel through this dark world of sin on the way to our heavenly home, we ask you to enlighten us with the light of your Word and so enable us to see your glory in heaven. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
prayers.trinity+8: Lord God our Heavenly Father, you are the one who called and entrusted your servants to serve you faithfully and wisely. You have promised your children that you will hear our prayers. Help us with your Holy Spirit so that we may ask only according to your will, and grant us what we ask for in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+9: O Lord our God, we honor you because you have forgiven our sins, and you daily protect us from evil. In this way, you show us that you are almighty God. May your Holy Spirit help us to be wise stewards who treasure the hope we have in you, and so fulfill the stewardship responsibility you have given us. Do not cut us off from the joy and grace of heaven. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+10: Almighty and eternal God, your goodness is far greater than our thoughts, words, and deeds. Do not count our sins against us, but have mercy on us. O righteous God, grant us your true righteousness and give us wisdom to discern good from evil. Give us the spirit of prayer, and teach us to pray by your Holy Spirit, for we do not know how or what to ask for. In the name of your only Son, Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
prayers.trinity+11: O God our heavenly Father, may we ever listen to your living Word, given through our Lord Jesus Christ. We ask you in the name of Jesus to guide us by your Holy Spirit to speak only the truth before you and all people. Amen.
prayers.trinity+12: Almighty God, cause faith, hope and love to grow more and more in our hearts. Help us to obey what you command. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, give us your power in the Holy Spirit, so that we may find what you have promised. Amen.
prayers.trinity+13: Most High Lord our God, we give you high praise because you are our true King. Come into the midst of your church and receive our thanks for all the good things you do for us every day. Hear our prayers through our Lord Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
prayers.trinity+14: O God, thank you for being the Creator and Protector of all, and for drawing us to yourself. Wake us up with your Holy Spirit to seek first your kingdom and your righteousness. We are ready to receive from your hand all that you give us in your grace. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+15: God our Father, you are kind and merciful. All your works are beautiful and wonderful. We thank you for creating the earth and all the creatures in it, and for giving it to us. We pray in the name of your only-begotten Son, Jesus Christ, that you will fill us with your understanding so that we do not destroy creation with greed and carelessness and bring calamity to ourselves and the next generation, but instead help us fulfill our responsibility to protect and care for your beautiful and wonderful creation, according to your good and gracious will for us in Christ Jesus our Lord. Amen.
prayers.trinity+16: Almighty God our Creator, guide your people with your light so that we may walk on the right path all our days. Help us resist all evil with the power of your Holy Spirit, and give us your grace to serve you with a pure heart. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+17: God, our heavenly Father, you know that we are a people who cannot keep your commandments. Therefore, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask you to increase our love for following your law and hearing your Word. Guide our hearts with your Holy Spirit. Amen.
prayers.trinity+18: Our living and eternal God, you are the one who helps us with your Holy Spirit and enables us to pray. We ask you to hear our prayers and answer them according to your good and gracious will, in Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
prayers.trinity+19: O Lord our God, who created us in your image and likeness, we thank you for the land you have given and for all your blessings that come from it. We ask you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to help us work dilligently to use the gifts you have given us according to your will. Give your blessing to us, our family, our church, and our land, through Christ our Lord. Amen.
prayers.trinity+20: Dear God, heavenly Father, we thank you for giving forgiveness of sins to all who believe in your Son Jesus Christ. Give us the power to truly forgive all those who wrong us. Pour your love into our hearts so that we may walk in the way that is right for your children. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
prayers.trinity+21: Almighty God, you are the Changeless One who rules this world forever. While we live on this earth, help us by the power of the Holy Spirit to keep your law and walk in the path of the children of light, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.trinity+22: O God our Father, your only Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, died and rose again and now reigns forever at your right hand. By your Holy Spirit, help us to cling to him as our only Savior, and so to receive eternal life with him forever in heaven. Amen.
prayers.trinity+23: Almighty God, Heavenly Father, we are sinners who deserve only wrath and judgment. But you saved us from eternal punishment by your only Son Jesus. Show us your kindness and increase your grace. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, your beloved Son, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
prayers.judgment-1: God, our heavenly Father, in your mercy protect us so that we do not fall asleep in sin like the foolish young women. Keep us watchful and alert by the power of the Holy Spirit. Help us to pray without ceasing, and at last enter your eternal kingdom. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.judgment: Lord our God, while we live in this world, keep us ever mindful of the final judgment so that we live according to your will. Prepare our hearts by your Holy Spirit so that we may receive eternal life from you. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.circumcision: O Lord God, who never changes, we thank you for giving your only Son to be our Savior. Help us by your Holy Spirit, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, so that we who are strangers and aliens in this world may follow him, and reach our home in the kingdom of heaven. Amen.
prayers.temple: Almighty and eternal God, on this day we remember that Mary, the mother of our Lord Jesus Christ, brought Jesus to the temple in obedience to the law. Prepare and help us with your Holy Spirit so that we too may come to your temple with a pure heart and stand before you without fear. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.annunciation: O God, our heavenly Father, in your great kindness you revealed through your angel that your only Son would be born on this earth for us and for our salvation. Help us by your Holy Spirit to fulfill your will and always to give thanks for your kindness and mercy. In the name of your beloved Son Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.tabor: Almighty God our Father, we thank you for showing the glory of Christ to the disciples on the mountain. Help us by your Holy Spirit to walk through the darkness of this world remembering of the light of the glory of Christ, until we finally see his glory face to face. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.last: Dear God our heavenly Father, you earnestly desire that no sinner be lost, but that all should repent and return to you. Do not judge us according to our sins, but look instead on our faith in Jesus. Strengthen us by the power of your Holy Spirit to fear, love, and serve you, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
prayers.newyear: Lord God, we thank you for sending your chosen servant John the Baptist to prepare the way for your Son Jesus Christ by teaching and baptizing. Send your Holy Spirit to bring us to repentance, so that we leave the way of sin and follow our Lord Jesus Christ. For the sake of your holy name. Amen.
prayers.mesqel: O Lord Jesus Christ, you are our Lord and Savior, who willingly suffered and died on the cross for us sinners. You are the God who redeemed us from eternal death by dying on the cross and blotting out all our sins. As we celebrate this feast of your cross, sanctify us with your Holy Spirit. May we always live under your cross and keep your eyes fixed on you, so that we may walk according to your will. Hear our prayers for the sake of your holy name and glory. Amen.
prayers.reformation: O Lord our God, you are Lord of all nations on earth. We praise you for sending your servants to call and renew your church to its proper function. Now in our time, raise up among us preachers and teachers who are enlightened by your Spirit, whose voices will awaken your church and proclaim the reality of your kingdom. Keep them faithful to your Word and strengthened by it. Be their strong defender before their enemies. In the name of your Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, Amen.
prayers.martyrs: Almighty God, you have sent your servants to carry your message of love to people of all ages. We ask you to revive in us the memory of these servants of yours, whose faithful witness to the gospel led them to pass through the road of the cross. Give us your grace to follow them in their path of faith and devotion. Give us the courage to bear witness throughout our lives to the victory of your Son over sin and death. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
